name: Superior Hunter's Prey
description: Once per turn when you deal damage to a creature marked by your Hunter's Mark, you can also deal that spell's extra damage to a different creature that you can see within 30 feet of the first creature.

mechanics.trigger: when you deal damage to a creature marked by your hunter's mark
mechanics.effect: deal the extra damage of Hunter's Mark
mechanics.target: a different creature you can see
mechanics.range: 30 feet from the creature you originally damaged
